ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
Language: python
Agentic IM Chatbot infrastructure that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
Language: python
LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析器：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] chenyme/grok2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chenyme/grok2api
Language: python
基于 FastAPI 构建的 Grok2API，全面适配 OpenAI 兼容的调用格式，支持流式/非流式对话、图像生成、图像编辑、视频生成、工具调用、语音聊天、一键NSFW、号池并发与自动负载均衡一体化。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] searxng/searxng
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/searxng/searxng
Language: python
SearXNG is a free internet metasearch engine which aggregates results from various search services and databases. Users are neither tracked nor profiled.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] vectorize-io/hindsight
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vectorize-io/hindsight
Language: python

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] volcengine/OpenViking
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/volcengine/OpenViking
Language: python
OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

Language: typescript
A tremendous feat of documentation, this guide covers Claude Code from beginner to power user, with production-ready templates for Claude Code features, guides on agentic workflows, and a lot of great learning materials, including quizzes and a handy "cheatsheet". Whether it's the "ultimate" guide to Claude Code will be up to the reader :)
